Tunis Montplaisir B25
Activit├ę Baity.tn est une Marketplace sp├ęcialis├ę dans la 
vente en d├ętail de tous articles maison, il regroupe plus de 
300 vendeurs et un catalogue de 10000 articles.
Aspect Technologique Baity.tn utilise les nouvelles tendances 
de Marketing digital et l'analyse de comportement de 
l'utilisateur.
Originalit├ę l'histoire a commenc├ę en 2017 par le d├ęveloppent 
d'un site E-commerce, ma sp├ęcialit├ę dÔÇÖorigine.
Activity Baity.tn is a Marketpalce specialized in sales 
of all home items, it includes more than 300 sellers and a 
catalog of 10,000 products.
Technological Aspect We use new digital marketing 
trends and user behavior analysis through advanced 
technological tools.
Originality the story began in 2017 with the development of 
E-commerce sites, which my academic specialty.
